headline: Earnings Preview: Orrstown Financial Services (ORRF) Q2 Earnings Expected to Decline
summary: Orrstown (ORRF) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: NII, Loan Growth to Aid CFG's Q2 Earnings Amid Expense Pressures
summary: Citizens Financial heads toward Q2 earnings release with expected NII, loan and fee growth, while higher expenses and credit provisions remain key watchpoints.

headline: Figma (FIG) Jumps On A Short Squeeze, Is The Upside Already Priced In?
summary: Figma (FIG) drew fresh attention after its stock climbed 11.9% in a short squeeze, following an SEC filing showing Citizens Financial Group bought over 162,000 shares and new Buy ratings from major banks. See our latest analysis for Figma. At a share price of $23.65, Figma’s recent 1-day share price return of 12.03% caps a strong short term run, with the 30-day share price return at 27.56% and year to date share price return still down 37.12%. This suggests momentum has picked up recently...
